name: exa_search
description: Search the web using Exa AI for current, relevant information. Supports web search, news, research papers, tweets, people, and company search.

query.description: The search query or topic to look up, e.g., 'latest AI safety research', 'python web frameworks comparison'

num_results.description: Number of search results to return (default: 5)

category.description: Optional category to search a dedicated index. Omit for general web search.
